CustomField.formula:
IF( TEXT(Lead_Type__c) = 'Fresh', CreatedDate,
IF( TEXT(Lead_Type__c) = 'Re-Engaged', IF( ISBLANK(Re_Engaged_Date__c), CreatedDate, Re_Engaged_Date__c ),
IF( TEXT(Lead_Type__c) = 'Re-Opened', IF( ISBLANK(Last_Re_Opened_Date__c), CreatedDate, Last_Re_Opened_Date__c ), CreatedDate ) ) )
CustomField.label: Created Date(C)
